title: IMD Issues Heavy Rain Alert for UP, Bihar, Odisha and Northeast India - AIMA Media
article_text:
IMD Issues Heavy Rain Alert for UP, Bihar, Odisha and Northeast India

India: The Indian Meteorological Department (IMD) has issued an alert for heavy to very heavy rainfall in several parts of Uttar Pradesh, Bihar, Uttarakhand, Odisha, and Northeast India. The alert warns of intensified monsoon activity expected in the next 24 hours, particularly in Uttar Pradesh, with thunderstorms, strong winds, and heavy rains forecasted in multiple districts.



Muradabad is expected to experience cloudy skies with thunderstorms and rain today. Intermittent rainfall over the coming days is likely to provide relief from the heat. Residents are advised to avoid unnecessary travel due to risks of waterlogging, lightning, and strong winds in the affected regions and to follow guidelines issued by the meteorological department.
